headline: Jim Cramer on Equinix: “It’s a Great Way to Play the Data Center”
summary: Equinix, Inc. (NASDAQ:EQIX) was one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar as he highlighted that semiconductor and AI infrastructure stocks are currently in charge. A caller sought Cramer’s opinion of the stock, and he replied, “Equinix, yes, it’s a great, it’s a great way to play the data center.” Equinix, Inc. (NASDAQ:EQIX) provides digital […]
